insights.title: Navigating volatility amid conflict in the Middle East
insights.summary: Investors may better navigate the uncertainty by combining diversified core exposures with differentiated return streams and active asset allocation.

insights.title: CIO webinar: Examining the Iran conflict
insights.summary: Global markets have entered a period of heightened volatility following the latest escalation of tensions involving Iran, as energy prices and risk assets adjust to the prospect of a more sustained geopolitical conflict. Against this backdrop, our senior investment team assess the evolving macro risks, outline potential scenarios and discuss how portfolios are positioned to navigate near-term uncertainty while remaining focused on longer-term fundamentals.

insights.title: Global Asset Allocation Insights - March 2026
insights.summary: Our Multi Asset team's views on which asset classes and markets are presenting the greatest opportunities and risks.
